name: invest_disk_latency_no_ti
prompt: Triage FortiSOAR alert `alerts:8d74ff80-3b63-406b-b748-6aca1f1f30ff` ("Server Disk Latency C:\ Warning on ORDERS-ERP"). Pull the alert, understand what host and condition it concerns, check whether ORDERS-ERP has other recent alerts, and give a short verdict on whether this is an operational/capacity issue or a security concern. Stage any follow-up for analyst approval with emit_action_card rather than executing it.

forbidden_facts.label: VirusTotal lookup — no external indicator on a disk-latency ITOps alert
Shodan lookup — no external indicator on a disk-latency ITOps alert
AbuseIPDB lookup — no external indicator on a disk-latency ITOps alert

notes: Restraint test: an ITOps disk-latency alert has no IPs/external indicators. A good triage pulls the record and correlates on the host; it must NOT gratuitously fire threat-intel enrichment. Pinned to a real live alert UUID.
